channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: An emotional Rafael Nadal retires at the Davis Cup after he loses and Spain is eliminated
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal bit his lower lip and his reddened eyes welled with tears as he stood alongside his Davis Cup teammates for Spain's national anthem Tuesday before what he — and everyone — knew might be the last match of his career.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Canucks star JT Miller leaves team for personal reasons
item.description: Vancouver Canucks star J.T. Miller will be away from the team indefinitely as he takes a leave of absence, the organization said Tuesday. No reason was given.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers rookie Dalton Knecht hits 9 3-pointers in another outstanding perimeter performance
item.description: Dalton Knecht could only shrug when he buried his fourth consecutive 3-pointer and sent the Los Angeles Lakers’ entire arena into a frenzy.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nuggets guard Russell Westbook posts 200th career triple-double in win over Grizzlies
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Denver Nuggets guard Russell Westbrook posted the 200th triple-double of his career on Tuesday night in a win over Memphis. The NBA recordholder for triple-doubles reached the milestone late in a 122-110 victory.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA champion Celtics take Round 1 and end Cavaliers' perfect season after 15 straight wins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — This one wasn’t about their perfect season or a 15-game winning streak or even the NBA Cup. This was a chance for the undefeated Cleveland Cavaliers to see where they stood against the defending champions.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kam Jones gets triple-double as No. 15 Marquette trounces No. 6 Purdue 76-58
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Kam Jones had 17 points, 13 rebounds and 10 assists as No. 15 Marquette defeated No. 6 Purdue 76-58 on Tuesday night to snap the Boilermakers’ 39-game regular-season nonconference winning streak.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Kansas overcomes sluggish start, beats UNC Wilmington 84-66 to give Bill Self 800th career win
item.description: Hunter Dickinson had 15 points and 15 rebounds, Dajuan Harris Jr. scored 16 points, and No. 1 Kansas shrugged off a sluggish start to beat UNC Wilmington 84-66 on Tuesday night and give Jayhawks coach Bill Self his 800th career win.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Brayden Point's OT winner helps Lightning rally past Penguins, 3-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored at 3:58 of overtime and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Pittsburgh Penguins 3-2 on Tuesday night. Point’s overtime winner was his 10th goal of the season. Anthony Cirelli scored his fifth goal of the season. Andrei Vasilevskiy stopped 17 shots for Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Celtics hand Cavaliers first loss of season, winning 120-117 to end Cleveland's 15-game win streak
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The defending NBA champions held off the league’s hottest team on Tuesday night, with Jayson Tatum scoring 33 points and adding 12 rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics to a 120-117 victory over Cleveland and hand the Cavaliers their first loss after 15 straight wins to open the season.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU and Arizona State both have exceeded expectations
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is still in the College Football Playoffs as of now, but they desperately need a win over #21 Arizona State in Tempe this Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CFP rankings: No changes at the top as Brigham Young drops, Boise State gains ground on the Big 12
item.description: The Broncos improved their position relative to the Big 12 after BYU dropped eight spots in the latest College Football Playoff rankings.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Colorado superfan Miss Peggy shares message about late twin sister on 100th birthday after Buffaloes win
item.description: Colorado superfan Peggy Coppom, or Miss Peggy as fans call her, celebrated her 100th birthday with head coach Deion Sanders at a press conference Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys brass 'didn't anticipate' miserable record, season
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys had a relatively quite offseason this past summer, but the franchise did not appear to expect the type of season they are experiencing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Chicago White Sox sign free agent veteran outfielder
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to a deal with veteran outfielder Austin Slater, who will provide roster depth and familiarity with new director of hitting Ryan Fuller.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Southwest employee welcomes Chiefs fans by playing Bills song over intercom
item.description: She said she wanted to let Chiefs fans know that "the Buffalo Bills have the best fans in the league.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: CMU drops final game at home against Western Colorado
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, Colorado Mesa University was dealt a setback by South Dakota Mines. Now, the Mavericks return to their home field with the stakes as high as the Rocky Mountains, aiming to secure a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz beat Dallas for first home victory, 115-113
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was finally home sweet home for the Utah Jazz. John Collins scored the last of his 28 points on a tiebreaking dunk with 6.4 seconds left to give the Utah Jazz their first home victory of the season, 115-113 over the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Corner Canyon beats Lehi in OT to advance to 6A title game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Corner Canyon is headed back to the 6A championship game, after a 35-34 overtime thriller over Lehi Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry upset after Klay 'ghosted' him before game, Draymond Green says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- While it seemed to be all sunshine and roses inside Chase Center as the packed arena welcomed back Klay Thompson on Tuesday, that wasn't exactly the case -- at least amongst the players on the court.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Rays' principal owner, said in an interview that Steinbrenner Field in Tampa is the best fit for the team.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago Sports Network launching subscription streaming service
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Sports Network is launching a streaming service Friday amid its negotiations with Xfinity. The subscription service will start at $19.99 for one team or $29.99 for full access to CHSN. A 7-day free trial is being offered.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Gulls to host Military Appreciation Night this Saturday
item.description: Get ready for an exciting evening of hockey, entertainment and heartfelt gratitude this Saturday, Nov. 16, as the San Diego Gulls host their Military Appreciation Night.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Judge denies Vanderbilt University QB's temporary restraining order
item.description: A federal judge has denied a Vanderbilt University quarterback's motion for a temporary restraining order.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Barker, NewsNation
